description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and caches the vendor directory. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build, then publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. Add a test job that runs on all branches except master, runs the same apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build commands, without any artifacts. Both jobs run in the default test stage and share the vendor cache.
